creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
Douglas, please get in touch with lua maintainer <him@richardkiss.com>
about this issue. It does not like a problem report against the port,
it's more of an support question.

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=108699

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

Why did the stoplight turn red?
You would too, if you had to change in front of all those people.
